title: AsManhunt
description: Track or be tracked – the ultimate Minecraft Manhunt experience!"
body:
#  **AsManhunt – Minecraft Manhunt Plugin with Hunter Compass**

Take your Minecraft manhunt games to the next level with **AsManhunt**! This plugin adds a fun and competitive twist by giving hunters a **tracking compass** to locate runners, while runners must survive and can even win by defeating the **Ender Dragon**.

**Features:**

* 🏃‍♂️ **Join Teams:** Players can join as **Hunters** or **Runners** using simple commands.
* 🧭 **Hunter Compass:** Hunters get a special compass that tracks the nearest runner in their world.
* ⚔️ **Victory Conditions:**

  * Hunters win when all runners are eliminated.
  * Runners win if any runner kills the Ender Dragon.
* 🎮 **Easy Commands:**

  * `/manhunt start` – Start the game.
  * `/manhunt stop` – Stop the game.
  * `/manhunt reset` – Force reset the game.
  * `/manhunt join hunter` – Join as Hunter.
  * `/manhunt join runner` – Join as Runner.
* 💡 **Simple & Fun:** Lightweight, easy to configure, and perfect for server manhunt events.

**Why choose AsManhunt?**

* Adds competitive thrill for players.
* Easy to use and integrate in any server.
* Encourages teamwork and strategy for both hunters and runners.
